xi.t: n. 希腊字母的第14个字母；粒子（等于xi particle）
xi.d: n. the 14th letter of the Greek alphabet

xia.t: abbr. X 波段[频带]干扰仪天线（X-band Interferometer Antenna）

xiah.t: n. 东方神起成员细亚俊秀

xial skeleton.t: [医] 中轴骨胳(头与脊柱的骨胳)

xian.d: n. a city of central China; capital of ancient Chinese empire 221-206 BC

xiang.t: 湘、象等同音中文字的拼音

xibornol.t: [化] 希波酚; 异冰片二甲酚

xii.d:
n the cardinal number that is the sum of eleven and one
s denoting a quantity consisting of 12 items or units

xiii.d:
n the cardinal number that is the sum of twelve and one
s being one more than twelve

ximenic acid.t: [化] 西门木烯酸; 二十六碳-17-烯酸

ximenynic acid.t: [化] 西门木炔酸; 11-十八碳烯-9-炔酸

xinca.t: n. 辛卡人(印第安之一族),辛卡语

xing.t: n. 侨兴环球（公司名字, 已在美国纳斯达克上市）

xingu.t: n. 兴谷河(巴西中北部一河流)

xinjiang.d: n. an autonomous province in far northwestern China on the border with Mongolia and Kazakhstan; the largest province in the People's Republic of China and the homeland of the Uighur people

xinjiang uighur autonomous region.t: [网络] 新疆维吾尔自治区

xipamide.t: [化] 希帕胺; 氯磺水杨胺

xiphias.d: n type genus of the Xiphiidae

xiphihumeralis.t: 剑肱骨, 剑突肱骨肌

xiphiidae.t: [网络] 剑旗鱼科；剑鱼科；箭鱼科

xiphiplastron.d:
n. The posterior, or fourth, lateral plate in the
   plastron of turtles; -- called also xiphisternum.

xiphisterna.t: n. 剑胸骨( xiphisternum的名词复数 ); [医]剑突, 剑胸骨

xiphisternum.d:
n. The posterior segment, or extremity, of the sternum;
   -- sometimes called metasternum, ensiform cartilage, ensiform process,
   or xiphoid process.
n. The xiphiplastron.

xiphodon.d:
n. An extinct genus of artiodactylous mammals found in the
   European Tertiary formations. It had slender legs, didactylous feet,
   and small canine teeth.

xiphoid.t:
n. 剑突
a. 剑状的
xiphoid.d:
a. Like a sword; ensiform.
a. Of or pertaining to the xiphoid process; xiphoidian.

xiphosuran.t:
n. 剑尾目动物
a. 剑尾目动物的

xiphura.d: n. pl. Same as Limuloidea. Called also Xiphosura.

xir.t: abbr. X-linked lymphocyte-regulated X-连锁淋巴调节

xis.t: abbr. xenon infrared searchlight 氙红外探照灯
xis.d:
n. the cardinal number that is the sum of ten and one
n. the 14th letter of the Greek alphabet

xiv.d:
n the cardinal number that is the sum of thirteen and one
s being one more than thirteen

xix.d:
n the cardinal number that is the sum of eighteen and one
s being one more than eighteen

xixs.t: (xix 的第三人称 -s形式) num. 罗马数字 19
xixs.d:
-s form of xix
n the cardinal number that is the sum of eighteen and one
s being one more than eighteen

xizang.d: n an autonomous region of the Peoples Republic of China; located in the Himalayas
